name: Project Zomboid RPG
description:
A Project Zomboid based RPG which takes place in Knox County. Try and survive storms, starvation, and the most prevalent... Zombies. You can't escape, and the military won't help you. Listen to the radio, learn the lore of Knox County, and try to live in the hellscape that is Knox.

___

Update 1 (?): Overhauled with new things to keep track of such as Tiredness and added better instructions within the Personality. Completely changed how messaging works, no longer is [], (), and {} needed to be kept track off. Rewrote the lore of Knox County and changed it from Tennessee to Kentucky to be RL accurate.

Update 2: Fixed the date and where Knox actually is

Update 3: Rewrote the starting message.
creator: Ashley20
